serviceNotes.engine oil: M43TU EU Inspection I/II: Oil Service 15,000 km or 12 months, whichever comes first, with standard engine oil.
serviceNotes.micro filter: Pollen filter per BMW fixed-interval booklet.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Fixed-interval engine air filter ~30,000 km typical for this generation.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Four-cylinder petrol spark plugs per BMW maintenance table (~60,000 km typical).
serviceNotes.check front brake pads: Inspect every 15,000 km with oil service pattern.

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW owner's manual E46 (EU) — Oil Service 15,000 km or 12 months, standard engine oil; Inspection I/II fixed schedule (pre-CBS)
serviceSources.micro filter: BMW owner's manual E46 (EU) — microfilter at Inspection II, 30,000 km
serviceSources.brake fluid: BMW owner's manual E46 — brake fluid every 24 months (DOT 4 LV)
serviceSources.air cleaner element: BMW owner's manual E46 (EU) — engine air filter at Inspection II, 30,000 km
serviceSources.spark plugs: https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2140-2000/service — 60,000 km; BMW owner's manual E46 four-cylinder petrol
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW owner's manual E46 — brake pad inspection every 15,000 km with Oil Service
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW owner's manual E46 — brake pad inspection every 15,000 km with Oil Service
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW owner's manual E46 (EU) — Inspection II / vehicle check 60,000 km
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: Haynes / ZF aftermarket guidance — ATF exchange despite BMW lifetime-fill wording; REC only
serviceSources.manual gearbox fluid: Haynes BMW 3 Series — manual gearbox oil on demand; REC preventive 100,000 km
serviceSources.coolant flush: BMW owner's manual E46 — coolant per model schedule; REC preventive 120,000 km
